findings.title: Juniper Networks PTX — Unauthenticated Root RCE
findings.affected_technology: Juniper Networks Junos OS Evolved (PTX Series)
findings.summary: Unauthenticated root RCE on Juniper PTX routers used in carrier-grade and enterprise core networks.

findings.title: Trend Micro Apex One — Critical Remote Code Execution
findings.summary: Two critical RCE vulnerabilities patched in Trend Micro Apex One enterprise endpoint security product.

findings.title: APT37 (ScarCruft) — New Toolset Breaches Air-Gapped Networks
findings.summary: North Korean APT37 deploys six new malware families using Zoho WorkDrive C2 and USB implants to breach air-gapped networks in campaign Ruby Jumper.

findings.title: Google API Keys Now Expose Gemini AI Data
findings.summary: Previously low-risk Google API keys embedded in client-side code can now authenticate to Gemini AI and access private data, retroactively exposing millions of leaked keys.

findings.title: CISA Warns RESURGE Malware Can Be Dormant on Ivanti Devices
findings.summary: CISA details RESURGE malware dormancy on Ivanti devices; orgs that patched but didn't fully remediate may still be compromised.

findings.title: Malicious Go Crypto Module — Password Theft + Rekoobe Backdoor
findings.summary: Malicious Go module impersonates golang.org/x/crypto, intercepts terminal passwords, and deploys Rekoobe Linux backdoor via namespace confusion.

noted.summary: European DIY chain breach impacts 38 million customers via third-party compromise.
Project Compass: 30 arrests of cybercrime collective targeting minors.
French football club confirms cyberattack after data leak.
Medical device maker discloses data theft in cyberattack.
Payment rate drops to 28% record low despite attack volume surge (Coveware report).
